title: Beyond the Seas
description: What happens after you graduate? You look for universities to do your PhD. But going through all the websites to find the right university is tiresome. Beyond the Seas is a platform where you can find all the information about the universities in one place.

title: Learn-E
description: Built a web learning platform where students can sign up for courses, go through video content and take tests. The platform was built using Nodejs, React and PostgreSQL.

title: Web Scraper
description: Built a web scraper to scrape data from a website. The scraper was built using Python and Selenium. It was able to scrape data from the different PhD portals to provide data to my project Beyond the Seas.

title: Car Warehouse
description: Built a car warehouse system using JavaFX. The system was able to store car information and show the information in a table. The system was built using JavaFX and MySQL.

title: C Compiler
description: Built a compiler from scratch with modern optimizations for a subset of the C language. It was the hardest assignment I had done in my university life, and the most enjoyable as well.
